summary: Iteration 447 - Feedback System and Credit Reset Testing. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend tests passed. Credit reset verified: test user has 50 credits, admin has high credits. Feedback API endpoints working correctly. Admin feedback dashboard loads with data. Feedback modal appears on logout when feature has been used.
critical_code_review_comments: experience_feedback.py: Well-structured with proper validation, rate limiting (3 per day), and sanitization
FeedbackModal.jsx: Has all required data-testid attributes for testing
AdminFeedbackPage.js: Proper pagination, filters, and mark-read functionality
AdminLayout.js: Correctly shows User Feedback nav item with unread badge under Analytics section
FeedbackContext.js: Properly intercepts logout to show feedback modal when user has used features
seed_data_creation: Created test feedback entries via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feedback system fully implemented and tested. Credit reset migration completed - test users have 50 credits, admin users unchanged. Feedback modal shows on logout when vs_has_used_feature=true in sessionStorage. Admin feedback dashboard at /app/admin/feedback with filters, pagination, mark-read functionality.

FEEDBACK_API.POST_feedback_experience: VERIFIED - Submits feedback with valid data
FEEDBACK_API.POST_feedback_validation: VERIFIED - Returns validation errors for missing fields
FEEDBACK_API.GET_admin_feedback: VERIFIED - Lists feedback with pagination (admin only)
FEEDBACK_API.GET_admin_feedback_filters: VERIFIED - Filters by rating, source, read_by_admin, search
FEEDBACK_API.POST_admin_bulk_mark_read: VERIFIED - Bulk marks feedback as read

FRONTEND.admin_sidebar_nav: VERIFIED - User Feedback nav item in Analytics section
FRONTEND.feedback_modal: VERIFIED - Modal appears on logout with all elements (rating, liked, improvements, reuse, skip, submit)
